projects.ts:
import { Component, ChangeDetectionStrategy, ElementRef, ViewChild, AfterViewInit, signal, computed, PLATFORM_ID, inject, } from "@angular/core"; import { isPlatformBrowser } from "@angular/common"; import { MatIconModule } from "@angular/material/icon"; import { animate, inView, stagger } from "motion"; import { Chart, registerables } from "chart.js"; import { LanguageService } from "../services/language.service"; Chart.register(...registerables); interface Project { id: string; title: string; description: string; tags: string[]; image: string; githubUrl?: string; liveUrl?: string; featured?: boolean; problem?: string; solution?: string; architecture?: string; outcome?: string; metrics?: { label: string; value: number; unit: string; color: string }[]; } @Component({ selector: "app-projects", changeDetection: ChangeDetectionStrategy.OnPush, imports: [MatIconModule], template: `

{{ lang() === "id" ? "Proyek" : "Projects" }}

@for (project of projects(); track project.id) {
visibility
@for (tag of project.tags; track tag) { {{ tag }} }

{{ project.title }} arrow_forward

{{ project.description }}

}
@if (selectedProject()) {
@for (tag of selectedProject()?.tags; track tag) { {{ tag }} }

{{ selectedProject()?.title }}

@if ( selectedProject()?.featured && (selectedProject()?.problem || selectedProject()?.solution) ) {
@if (selectedProject()?.problem) {

report_problem {{ lang() === "id" ? "Masalah (Problem)" : "Problem" }}

{{ selectedProject()?.problem }}

} @if (selectedProject()?.solution) {

lightbulb {{ lang() === "id" ? "Solusi (Solution)" : "Solution" }}

{{ selectedProject()?.solution }}

} @if (selectedProject()?.architecture) {

architecture {{ lang() === "id" ? "Arsitektur & Tech Stack" : "Architecture & Tech Stack" }}

{{ selectedProject()?.architecture }}

} @if (selectedProject()?.outcome) {

trending_up {{ lang() === "id" ? "Hasil (Outcome)" : "Outcome" }}

{{ selectedProject()?.outcome }}

} @if (selectedProject()?.metrics) {

bar_chart {{ lang() === "id" ? "Metrik Kunci" : "Key Metrics" }}

}
} @else {

{{ selectedProject()?.description }}

}
@if (selectedProject()?.liveUrl) { {{ lang() === "id" ? "Lihat Langsung" : "Live View" }} launch } @if (selectedProject()?.githubUrl) { GitHub } @if (selectedProject()?.outcome) { }
}
`, }) export class ProjectsComponent implements AfterViewInit { @ViewChild("projectsSection") section!: ElementRef; langService = inject(LanguageService); lang = this.langService.currentLang; selectedProject = signal(null); chartInstance: Chart | null = null; private platformId = inject(PLATFORM_ID); projects = computed(() => { const isId = this.lang() === "id"; return [ { id: "p1", title: isId ? "Dasbor Pemantauan Mesin" : "Machine Monitoring Dashboard", description: isId ? "Sistem pemantauan real-time menggunakan SQL Server. Menampilkan dasbor yang sangat visual yang dibangun dengan TailwindCSS untuk melacak status mesin, waktu henti, dan metrik produksi secara instan." : "Real-time monitoring system using SQL Server. Features a highly visual dashboard built with TailwindCSS to track machine status, downtime, and production metrics instantly.", tags: ["SQL Server", "TailwindCSS", "Real-time"], image: "https://picsum.photos/seed/dashboard/800/600", liveUrl: "https://example.com/dashboard", githubUrl: "https://github.com/yourusername/dashboard", featured: true, problem: isId ? "Pabrik mengalami kesulitan melacak waktu henti (downtime) mesin secara real-time. Laporan manual sering kali tidak akurat dan tertunda, menyebabkan kerugian produksi yang tidak terdeteksi dengan cepat." : "The factory had difficulty tracking machine downtime in real-time. Manual reports were often inaccurate and delayed, leading to undetected production losses.", solution: isId ? "Membangun dasbor web interaktif yang terhubung langsung dengan database mesin. Dasbor ini memvisualisasikan status mesin secara langsung, memberikan peringatan instan saat terjadi anomali, dan menghasilkan laporan otomatis." : "Built an interactive web dashboard connected directly to the machine database. This dashboard visualizes machine status live, provides instant alerts for anomalies, and generates automated reports.", architecture: isId ? "Memilih SQL Server karena kemampuannya menangani transaksi data bervolume tinggi dari sensor mesin secara andal. Backend menggunakan Node.js untuk streaming data via WebSocket ke frontend Angular yang di-styling dengan TailwindCSS untuk UI yang responsif dan cepat." : "Chose SQL Server for its ability to reliably handle high-volume data transactions from machine sensors. The backend uses Node.js for streaming data via WebSocket to an Angular frontend styled with TailwindCSS for a fast, responsive UI.", outcome: isId ? "Meningkatkan efisiensi pabrik sebesar 20% dalam bulan pertama dengan mengidentifikasi dan mengurangi waktu henti mesin yang tidak terencana secara drastis." : "Increased factory efficiency by 20% in the first month by drastically identifying and reducing unplanned machine downtime.", metrics: [ { label: isId ? "Peningkatan Efisiensi" : "Efficiency Increase", value: 20, unit: "%", color: "#39d353", }, { label: isId ? "Pengurangan Waktu Henti" : "Downtime Reduction", value: 35, unit: "%", color: "#00f0ff", }, { label: isId ? "Kecepatan Pelaporan" : "Reporting Speed", value: 80, unit: "%", color: "#b026ff", }, ], }, { id: "p2", title: isId ? "Sistem Kasir (POS)" : "Point of Sale (POS) System", description: isId ? "Sistem Point of Sale komprehensif yang dibangun dengan ASP.NET Core. Menerapkan arsitektur bersih, otentikasi aman, dan operasi CRUD penuh untuk manajemen inventaris." : "Comprehensive Point of Sale system built with ASP.NET Core. Implements clean architecture, secure authentication, and full CRUD operations for inventory management.", tags: ["ASP.NET Core", "C#", "Clean Architecture"], image: "https://picsum.photos/seed/pos/800/600", githubUrl: "https://github.com/yourusername/pos-system", featured: true, problem: isId ? "Klien ritel membutuhkan sistem kasir yang dapat beroperasi offline saat koneksi internet putus, namun tetap bisa sinkronisasi data inventaris secara terpusat saat online kembali." : "Retail clients needed a POS system that could operate offline when the internet connection dropped, yet still synchronize inventory data centrally when online again.", solution: isId ? "Mengembangkan aplikasi POS desktop/web hybrid. Menggunakan local database untuk transaksi offline dan background worker untuk sinkronisasi otomatis ke cloud server saat koneksi tersedia." : "Developed a hybrid desktop/web POS application. Used a local database for offline transactions and a background worker for automatic synchronization to the cloud server when a connection is available.", architecture: isId ? "Menggunakan ASP.NET Core untuk backend karena ekosistem C# yang kuat dan performa tinggi. Menerapkan Clean Architecture untuk memisahkan business logic dari detail infrastruktur, memudahkan pengujian dan pemeliharaan jangka panjang." : "Used ASP.NET Core for the backend due to the strong C# ecosystem and high performance. Implemented Clean Architecture to separate business logic from infrastructure details, facilitating long-term testing and maintenance.", outcome: isId ? "Mengurangi antrean kasir hingga 30% berkat UI yang dioptimalkan dan memastikan nol kehilangan data transaksi meskipun terjadi pemadaman internet harian." : "Reduced cashier queues by up to 30% thanks to an optimized UI and ensured zero loss of transaction data despite daily internet outages.", metrics: [ { label: isId ? "Pengurangan Antrean" : "Queue Reduction", value: 30, unit: "%", color: "#b026ff", }, { label: isId ? "Kehilangan Data" : "Data Loss", value: 0, unit: "%", color: "#00f0ff", }, { label: isId ? "Waktu Sinkronisasi" : "Sync Time", value: 95, unit: "%", color: "#39d353", }, ], }, { id: "p3", title: isId ? "Pasar Papan Reklame" : "Billboard Marketplace", description: isId ? "Platform untuk menyewa dan menyewakan ruang papan reklame. Dibangun dengan React dan Express, mengintegrasikan Google Maps API untuk pencarian dan visualisasi berbasis lokasi." : "Platform for renting and leasing billboard space. Built with React and Express, integrating Google Maps API for location-based search and visualization.", tags: ["React", "Express", "Google Maps API"], image: "https://picsum.photos/seed/billboard/800/600", liveUrl: "https://example.com/billboard", githubUrl: "https://github.com/yourusername/billboard", }, { id: "p4", title: isId ? "Sistem OEE" : "OEE System", description: isId ? "Sistem pelacakan Overall Equipment Effectiveness (OEE) untuk manufaktur. Dibangun menggunakan AVEVA Edge untuk antarmuka langsung dengan PLC dan menghitung metrik efisiensi." : "Overall Equipment Effectiveness (OEE) tracking system for manufacturing. Built using AVEVA Edge for direct interface with PLCs and calculating efficiency metrics.", tags: ["AVEVA Edge", "Manufacturing", "SCADA"], image: "https://picsum.photos/seed/factory/800/600", liveUrl: "https://example.com/oee", }, { id: "p5", title: isId ? "Platform E-Commerce" : "E-Commerce Platform", description: isId ? "Toko online full-stack dengan keranjang belanja, integrasi pembayaran, dan panel admin. Dibangun menggunakan Angular dan Node.js." : "Full-stack online store with shopping cart, payment integration, and admin panel. Built using Angular and Node.js.", tags: ["Angular", "Node.js", "Stripe"], image: "https://picsum.photos/seed/ecommerce/800/600", liveUrl: "https://example.com/ecommerce", githubUrl: "https://github.com/yourusername/ecommerce", }, { id: "p6", title: isId ? "Situs Web Portofolio" : "Portfolio Website", description: isId ? "Situs web portofolio pribadi yang responsif dan dapat disesuaikan dengan dukungan tema gelap dan animasi halus." : "Responsive and customizable personal portfolio website with dark theme support and smooth animations.", tags: ["Angular", "TailwindCSS", "Motion"], image: "https://picsum.photos/seed/portfolio/800/600", liveUrl: "https://example.com/portfolio", githubUrl: "https://github.com/yourusername/portfolio", }, { id: "p7", title: isId ? "Aplikasi Manajemen Tugas" : "Task Management App", description: isId ? "Aplikasi manajemen tugas kolaboratif dengan pembaruan real-time, papan kanban, dan pelacakan kemajuan." : "Collaborative task management application with real-time updates, kanban boards, and progress tracking.", tags: ["React", "Firebase", "TailwindCSS"], image: "https://picsum.photos/seed/taskapp/800/600", liveUrl: "https://example.com/taskapp", githubUrl: "https://github.com/yourusername/taskapp", }, ]; }); downloadReport(project: Project) { // Generate a minimal valid PDF with the project summary const pdfContent = `%PDF-1.4\n1 0 obj\n<< /Type /Catalog /Pages 2 0 R >>\nendobj\n2 0 obj\n<< /Type /Pages /Kids [3 0 R] /Count 1 >>\nendobj\n3 0 obj\n<< /Type /Page /Parent 2 0 R /MediaBox [0 0 612 792] /Resources << /Font << /F1 4 0 R >> >> /Contents 5 0 R >>\nendobj\n4 0 obj\n<< /Type /Font /Subtype /Type1 /BaseFont /Helvetica >>\nendobj\n5 0 obj\n<< /Length 100 >>\nstream\nBT\n/F1 16 Tf\n50 700 Td\n(${this.lang() === "id" ? "Laporan Proyek" : "Project Report"}: ${project.title.replace(/[()]/g, "")}) Tj\n0 -30 Td\n/F1 12 Tf\n(${this.lang() === "id" ? "Hasil" : "Outcome"}: ${project.outcome?.replace(/[()]/g, "").substring(0, 80)}...) Tj\nET\nendstream\nendobj\nxref\n0 6\n0000000000 65535 f \n0000000009 00000 n \n0000000058 00000 n \n0000000115 00000 n \n0000000289 00000 n \n0000000377 00000 n \ntrailer\n<< /Size 6 /Root 1 0 R >>\nstartxref\n520\n%%EOF`; const blob = new Blob([pdfContent], { type: "application/pdf" }); const url = window.URL.createObjectURL(blob); const a = document.createElement("a"); a.href = url; a.download = `${this.lang() === "id" ? "Laporan" : "Report"}_${project.title.replace(/\s+/g, "_")}.pdf`; document.body.appendChild(a); a.click(); document.body.removeChild(a); window.URL.revokeObjectURL(url); } ngAfterViewInit() { if (isPlatformBrowser(this.platformId)) { inView( this.section.nativeElement, () => { const header = this.section.nativeElement.querySelector(".project-header"); const cards = this.section.nativeElement.querySelectorAll(".project-card"); animate( header, { opacity: [0, 1], y: [20, 0] }, { duration: 0.6, ease: [0.22, 1, 0.36, 1] }, ); animate( cards, { opacity: [0, 1], y: [30, 0] }, { delay: stagger(0.15, { startDelay: 0.2 }), duration: 0.8, ease: [0.22, 1, 0.36, 1], }, ); }, { margin: "-100px" }, ); } } openModal(project: Project) { this.selectedProject.set(project); // Add small delay to allow DOM to render modal before animating setTimeout(() => { const backdrop = document.querySelector(".modal-backdrop"); const content = document.querySelector(".modal-content"); if (backdrop && content) { animate(backdrop, { opacity: [0, 1] }, { duration: 0.3 }); animate( content, { opacity: [0, 1], scale: [0.95, 1], y: [20, 0] }, { duration: 0.4, ease: "easeOut" }, ); } // Initialize chart if metrics exist const metrics = project.metrics; if (metrics && isPlatformBrowser(this.platformId)) { setTimeout(() => { const ctx = document.getElementById( "metricChart", ) as HTMLCanvasElement; if (ctx) { if (this.chartInstance) { this.chartInstance.destroy(); } this.chartInstance = new Chart(ctx, { type: "bar", data: { labels: metrics.map((m) => m.label), datasets: [ { label: this.lang() === "id" ? "Metrik" : "Metric", data: metrics.map((m) => m.value), backgroundColor: metrics.map((m) => m.color), borderRadius: 6, barThickness: 40, }, ], }, options: { responsive: true, maintainAspectRatio: false, plugins: { legend: { display: false }, tooltip: { callbacks: { label: (context) => ` ${context.parsed.y}${metrics[context.dataIndex].unit}`, }, }, }, scales: { y: { beginAtZero: true, grid: { color: "rgba(156, 163, 175, 0.1)" }, ticks: { color: "rgba(156, 163, 175, 0.8)" }, }, x: { grid: { display: false }, ticks: { color: "rgba(156, 163, 175, 0.8)" }, }, }, }, }); } }, 100); // Small delay to ensure canvas is rendered } }, 10); document.body.style.overflow = "hidden"; } closeModal() { const backdrop = document.querySelector(".modal-backdrop"); const content = document.querySelector(".modal-content"); if (backdrop && content) { animate(backdrop, { opacity: [1, 0] }, { duration: 0.2 }); animate( content, { opacity: [1, 0], scale: [1, 0.95], y: [0, 20] }, { duration: 0.2 }, ).finished.then(() => { this.selectedProject.set(null); document.body.style.overflow = ""; if (this.chartInstance) { this.chartInstance.destroy(); this.chartInstance = null; } }); } else { this.selectedProject.set(null); document.body.style.overflow = ""; if (this.chartInstance) { this.chartInstance.destroy(); this.chartInstance = null; } } } }
